examples: The scientists will study the variety of trees and observe which are fruiting.
Jack was careful to observe the proprieties, treating her with exaggerated respect.
Imposing speed restrictions is easy, but forcing drivers to observe them is trickier.
Godfrey and Utley observe that the documents show customs and laws that changed over time.
This eight day tour provided the first sustained opportunity to observe Camilla in action as a royal.
